title: PolyAPI API Function
description: An API function wraps a third-party API call and is invoked through the PolyAPI gateway, providing a managed proxy with built-in authentication, monitoring, and variable injection.

id.description: The unique identifier of the API function.

name.description: The name of the API function.

description.description: A description of what the API function does.

context.description: The context path for organizing the function in the catalog.

method.description: The HTTP method used by the API function.

url.description: The target URL for the API call.

headers.description: HTTP headers to include in the API call.

requestBody.description: The request body schema for the API call.

state.description: The lifecycle state of the function.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the function was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the function was last updated.
